commands: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python scripts/run_experiment.py --config configs/dico/lora_r8.yaml --override experiment_name=e00_lora_pilot_seed42 --override seed=42 --override calibration.seed=42 --override preallocation.sketch_seed=42 --override training.batch_size=4 --override training.gradient_accumulation_steps=16 --override training.max_steps=1

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python scripts/run_experiment.py --config configs/dico/dico_cd_da_r8.yaml --override experiment_name=e00_covra_pilot_seed42 --override seed=42 --override calibration.seed=42 --override preallocation.sketch_seed=42 --override training.batch_size=4 --override training.gradient_accumulation_steps=16 --override training.max_steps=1

NUM_GPUS=3 bash scripts/run_ddp.sh configs/dico/dico_cd_da_r8.yaml --override experiment_name=e00_covra_ddp_fallback_seed42 --override seed=42 --override calibration.seed=42 --override training.max_steps=1
notes: Default protocol is single GPU per seed: batch 4 × grad_accum 16 = global batch 64.
DDP command is fallback only: 3 × per-device batch 3 × grad_accum 7 = global batch 63 by script default.
experiments.purpose: Verify single-GPU global batch 64, logging, parameter counts, and CovRA allocation before real GPU runs.
experiments.title: single-GPU scheduling pilot

commands: python scripts/platform_train.py --config configs/dico/lora_r8.yaml --config configs/dico/adalora_r8.yaml --config configs/dico/gora_public_r8.yaml --config configs/dico/dico_cd_da_r8.yaml --num-gpus 3 --child-num-processes 1 --seeds 42,43,44 --batch-size 4 --grad-accum 16 --output-dir outputs/e01_llama3_r8_aligned_sdpa_v4
notes: GoRA-public uses the locked official commit behavior and preserves its realized method-faithful budget.
EVA is outside the current implementation scope and remains protocol-blocked.
CovRA-I and CovRA-M are mechanism controls and are scheduled separately in E04/E05, not mixed into the E01 main table.
adalora status=IMPLEMENTED_NOT_GPU_RUN using configs/dico/adalora_r8.yaml; eva status=BLOCKED_BY_UNRESOLVED_PROTOCOL; gora_public status=IMPLEMENTED_NOT_GPU_RUN.
experiments.purpose: Main fair comparison for implemented methods under GoRA-aligned single-GPU global batch 64 scheduling.
experiments.title: Llama3 r8 main results

notes: Use E01 artifacts if their budget error is already zero or within the registered strict rule.
experiments.purpose: Audit LoRA, GoRA-BM, and CovRA actual trainable parameter budgets; rerun only if E01 logs are not strict-budget.
experiments.title: strict-budget audit

commands: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 python scripts/run_experiment.py --config configs/dico/gora_paper_gamma08.yaml --override experiment_name=e03_gora_gamma08_seed42 --override seed=42 --override calibration.seed=42 --override preallocation.sketch_seed=42 --override training.batch_size=4 --override training.gradient_accumulation_steps=16 --override training.max_steps=1563

notes: Do not use E03 to select the main GoRA-public setting from test results.
experiments.purpose: Appendix-only sensitivity for GoRA N/gamma/warmup conflicts.

experiments.purpose: Compare CovRA against CovRA-I with one unique difference: conditional residual value vs fixed independent energy.
experiments.title: conditional valuation

experiments.purpose: Compare CovRA-I against CovRA-M; response-overlap analysis reuses artifacts and adds no training.
experiments.title: direction-level structure

experiments.purpose: Separate rank allocation benefit from direction-subspace initialization benefit.
experiments.title: rank/init separation

experiments.purpose: Ablate grouped response statistics without changing training, budget, or evaluation interface.
experiments.title: global/grouped sketch ablation

commands: python scripts/platform_train.py --config configs/ablations/no_sign_split.yaml --config configs/ablations/no_type_scaling.yaml --config configs/ablations/no_log_compression.yaml --config configs/ablations/proportional_rounding.yaml --num-gpus 3 --child-num-processes 1 --seeds 42,43,44 --batch-size 4 --grad-accum 16 --output-dir outputs/e08_component_ablations
experiments.purpose: Test sign split, type scaling, log compression, and proportional rounding as one-factor changes.
experiments.title: supporting component ablations

commands: python scripts/final_delivery_report.py --json-output reports/final_delivery.json --markdown-output reports/final_delivery.md --test-result '<paste latest pytest result>'
experiments.purpose: Collect calibration/allocation/training timing, memory, tokens/s, and budget fields from E01/E04-E08 artifacts.
experiments.title: efficiency and budget report
